title: No Lightning Fire
description: A datapack that removes fire from lightning strikes
body:
This datapack removes the fire that lightning creates when it strikes. 

It **does not** remove any other function of lightning. For example, lightning will still turn creepers in to charged creepers.
It also **does not** remove any properties of fire. Fire will still spread and behave as normal.
